sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3416" key="a)kra/spedos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκράσπεδος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n3416.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without fringes</tr_>: metaph., of words, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without the article</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1010d</biblScope> </bibl> (cj.
